summary: Lead accepts M6-LAYERED-AI-001 after systems_architect R2 ACCEPT and lead integration gates passed. The integrated branch implements bounded deterministic M6 layered AI over strategic, campaign, recovery, succession, diplomatic, and policy layers; preserves command parity through shared GameCommand payloads; keeps system support commands separately whitelisted; and provides bounded reason traces and full Alpha run validation without rescue hooks.

tests_run.result: Passed 25 test files / 191 tests; existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning observed.
Passed; M6 Alpha Node/Worker-compatible hash 260f46c3 and terminal outcome victory.
Passed format, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundaries.
Passed architecture:check, sim:determinism, root Vitest 40 files / 304 tests, and apps/web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests.

decisions: Accept systems_architect R2 ACCEPT for M6-LAYERED-AI-001.
Keep trace types sim-ai-local for this task; defer protocol DTO promotion to later consumers if needed.
System support commands remain separated from AI/player parity and constrained to scheduler/legitimacy support.
Proceed to PR/CI integration; do not mark CLOSED until this branch enters origin/main and closure checkpoint is merged.
risks: No P0/P1 risk remains open for this task after R2 fixes, systems ACCEPT, and lead gates.
Payload comparison evidence uses JSON.stringify for validation only, not authoritative simulation decisions; acceptable under current DTO shapes.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close M6-LAYERED-AI-001 and continue to the next READY M6 task.
